pageSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before participating in any auction
section1Content: Every bid must be higher than the current price. Bids cannot be withdrawn once submitted. The auction winner is obligated to complete the purchase.
section2Content: Sellers must provide accurate and honest product information. Sellers may only cancel an auction before any bids are received. The seller is committed to delivering the product to the winner after the auction ends.
section3Content: Buyers must verify product details before bidding. Winning an auction means commitment to purchase at the final price. Payment must be completed within 48 hours of auction end.
section4Content: The platform reserves the right to suspend or delete any auction that violates policies. Users can report any suspicious activity. Reports will be reviewed and acted upon within 24 hours.
section5Content: The platform is committed to protecting user data. Personal data will not be shared with third parties. All transactions are encrypted and secure.
